content:
@canne: On a sidenote: We are trying to rewrite the Developer Guide. From the discussion here, I understand that the messaging API is a central part of the interface between plugins and the core. Since you seem to have figured this out: could you possibly write a draft for a page with a description of the messaging facilities?

Off Topic to answer @leamas your writeup partially answered #1070
https://github.com/OpenCPN/OpenCPN/issues/1070
